response.justification: Candidate is a versatile full-stack engineer with strong web/distributed systems exposure, but the role requires 8 years of C++ and this resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015). Primary stacks are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not C++. No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or formal tech-lead mentoring of cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP req/sec
Long track record of testing discipline, TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
Founder/architect experience on GISCollective shows ownership of ambiguous, long-running technical projects
concerns: C++ experience is ~6 months, far short of the 8-year minimum
No internal cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture leadership shown
No explicit tech-lead role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
